package rulefixtures

// scenario for mutex_value_receiver: `func (s MyStruct) Method()` where `MyStruct` contains a `sync.Mutex` or `sync.RWMutex` field
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule619NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario619Negative(records []Rule619NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
